label: Transparent honeysuckle flowers motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Honeysuckle transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete honeysuckle flower motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A woodland vine honeysuckle cluster with cream-yellow tubular flowers, coral throat transitions, slender green stems, fresh leaves, and warm natural botanical texture. Crisp edges, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete flower cluster cutout with blossoms, leaves, and stems visible without cropping.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #0000ff background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no jasmine, no gardenia, no orchid, no vase, no hand, no props, no landscape, no insects.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Honeysuckle light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Honeysuckle, derived from the visible honeysuckle flower cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished sweet collaboration-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Honeysuckle, Honeysuckle Flowers, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract cream-yellow petals, coral flower throats, honey-gold highlights, stem-green accents, vine-tan muted surfaces, and woodland depth for collaborative workspaces, activity feeds, comments, and shared project dashboards.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, collaboration cards, activity feeds, tables, command palette, sidebar, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, border, shadow, and token swatches.
Constraints: no generic yellow UI, no unrelated neon colors, no beige-only flat palette, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Honeysuckle.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Honeysuckle dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Honeysuckle that feels like the light board translated to dark mode.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished professional design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Honeysuckle, Honeysuckle Flowers, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve honey-gold actions, cream foregrounds, coral collaboration chips, stem-green success states, woodland-vine dark surfaces, and warm activity-feed structure for collaborative product interfaces.
Constraints: no neon palette, no generic black UI, no unrelated colors, no tiny text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Honeysuckle.
